summary: Stage GR decompilation slice for Big Blue, Fourside, Rainbow Cruise, Shrine Route, Old Yoshi, and Venom. The PR body and bot report claim 10 new exact matches, 11 unmatched-item improvements, clean isolated/full regression reports, and git diff/check success. The diff shows implementation matching, type/union refinements in gr/types.h, stage-local field naming, local struct/layout work, inlining/splitting tactics, PAD_STACK/local-order changes, and data/literal ownership changes. Review discussion was mixed: several comments challenged literal-to-symbol changes, copied jobj.h inline forms, static inlines, and formatting, while author replies argued some choices were backed by target section/symbol metadata and regression reports.

key_files.role: Big Blue stage matching and cleanup; replaced many raw gp offset accesses with gp->gv.bigblue.platform fields, adjusted locals/PAD_STACK, ABS use, and float/data references.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grBigBlue_801EA05C raw offsets to gp->gv.bigblue.platform fields
text_corpus bot report: grBigBlue_801EF424 and grBigBlue_801E8D64 new exact matches; grBigBlue_801EA05C and grBigBlue_801EACE8 improved
review_comments: discussion_r3409808025 asks to use TU-owned ground vars instead of arwing/borrowed vars

key_files.role: Fourside UFO matching; split grFourside_801F3894 body into static inline helper taking gobj/gp/jobj/state/prev_building.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: grFourside_801F3894 new exact match

key_files.role: Old Yoshi matching and rodata layout; changed grOy_803B83F0 from int array to struct-wrapped data with pad and adjusted local copy/PAD_STACK placement.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: grOldYoshi_8020F088 and .rodata new exact matches

key_files.role: Rainbow Cruise matching and data/layout work; added target-owned string/data objects, RCruise-specific local structs, inline helper changes, table data, and loop/body reshaping.

key_files.role: Venom matching and data/type cleanup; large implementation reshaping, local grVenom_JObj* inline mirrors, grVe_TimingData field access, linked_gobj/xC4_flags use, switch/goto reshapes, PAD_STACK/local changes.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3409762899 says grVenom_JObj* helpers mirror jobj.h helpers with matching assert line numbers
review_comments: discussion_r3409814806 and related comments object to copied jobj.h inlines

key_files.role: GroundVars type updates for stage-specific storage, including grVenom xC4_flags/linked_gobj unions and grBigBlue_PlatformVars overlay.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grBigBlue_PlatformVars added and unioned into grBigBlue_GroundVars

what_changed: Added exact-match decompilation progress across six stage files; PR body claims 10 newly exact functions and 11 still-unmatched improvements.
Moved Big Blue platform state from raw gp offset writes/reads into typed gp->gv.bigblue.platform fields backed by grBigBlue_PlatformVars in types.h.
Added Venom GroundVars overlays for xC4 bit flags and linked_gobj, replacing some borrowed/opaque storage uses in Venom code.

Introduced or adjusted stage-local data symbols such as grBb_804DB2F0, grRc_803E4F44, grOy_803B83F0_Data, and Venom grVe_* sdata/string references where the PR evidence says target metadata drove matches.
Used code-shape tactics including PAD_STACK changes, local declaration ordering, helper inlining, switch/goto reshaping, temporary local structs, and explicit casts to influence MWCC output.
Retained or introduced local static inline forms for some operations, notably Fourside helper extraction and Venom JObj helper mirrors.

smart_moves.text: Replacing raw Big Blue gp offset arithmetic with a stage-owned GroundVars overlay improved readability and aligned with reviewer guidance to use each TU's own ground vars instead of borrowed arms.
The PR separated exact-match claims from near-match improvements: grRCruise_801FF924 was explicitly described as improved to 99.99% but not exact.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: 11 improvements in unmatched items

smart_moves.text: Author replies tied controversial data-symbol uses to specific section/symbol metadata and regression reports instead of presenting them as ordinary cleanup.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage TUs, prefer adding or refining the owning GroundVars union/struct arm over using raw gp offsets or unrelated stage union arms when the same offsets are stage-owned.

Literal-to-symbol changes are review-sensitive; if a matching slice needs them, attach section/symbol ownership and regression evidence, and expect pushback when the change resembles data-linking work.
Header inline recovery can require exact assert file/line behavior, but copied local inline mirrors of jobj.h helpers are controversial and should be treated as an exception needing narrow evidence.
When a helper or local struct is introduced only for codegen shape, record whether it reaches an exact match or only an improvement; the latter should not be described as a completed match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: grRCruise_801FF924 listed as improvement rather than exact

naming_conventions.name: address-style names retained for uncertain symbols

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK and local declaration ordering changes were used to steer stack/register layout.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK changes in grBigBlue_801EACE8 and grBigBlue_801EF424 local ordering

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Typed field overlays replaced raw pointer arithmetic where type information was recovered or added.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Big Blue raw offset conversions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Control-flow and expression reshaping included switch/grouped cases, ABS macro use, goto labels, temporary variables, and assignment collapsing such as pos = half_bot.
Static inline helper extraction/mirroring was used for Fourside and Venom matching, but review comments flagged copied static/JObj inlines as risky.
Target-owned data references were used for constants and strings when author evidence claimed section/symbol ownership.

review_feedback.feedback: Reviewer objected to replacing ordinary literals with named data symbols in Big Blue and Rainbow Cruise, asking to revert and use literals until linking/data ownership work is appropriate.
Reviewer said each TU should use its own ground vars, not borrowed gv.arwing-style fields, and this applies across touched files.
Reviewer said jobj.h references indicate jobj.h inlines and objected to copied local jobj inline bodies; author argued Venom local mirrors preserved assert line numbers and target-owned strings.
Reviewer flagged some RCruise inline/static formatting as poor and said not to inline statics; evidence does not show final resolution in the loaded slice.
PR body and bot report claimed clean regression results, 10 new matches, no broken matches, and no fuzzy/metric regressions.

notes: PR identity, changed files, merge timestamp, and high-level verification claims are strong.
Review discussion is mixed and contains explicit disagreement; do not treat author replies or reviewer objections alone as final accepted standards.
The raw diff was truncated in loaded context, so file-specific summaries for grshrineroute and later Venom hunks are less complete than Big Blue/RCruise/Venom review topics.
The PR was merged, but the loaded evidence does not show which contested comments were resolved by edits versus accepted as-is.
Data-symbol ownership claims are present in author review replies, but this intake does not independently validate target section metadata.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use stage-owned GroundVars overlays in stage TUs
accepted_candidate_records.text: When matching stage ground code, replace raw gp offset access or unrelated borrowed union arms with the owning stage's GroundVars fields/overlays when offsets are understood. PR 2688 shows Big Blue and Venom overlays being added in types.h and a reviewer explicitly requests TU-owned ground vars.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Separate exact matches from near-match improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: If a change improves a still-unmatched function, label it as an improvement and keep exact-match claims limited to bot/objdiff-supported symbols. PR 2688 explicitly notes grRCruise_801FF924 improved to 99.99% but was not exact.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify exception path for target-owned literals in matching PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2688 shows a recurring review tension: reviewers objected to literal-to-symbol replacements, while author replies argued specific grBb/grRc/grVe symbols were backed by target .sdata/.sdata2/.data metadata and clean regression reports. Consider adding a standards note that such replacements require explicit symbol/section ownership evidence, narrow scope, and regression evidence, and should not be generalized as ordinary cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards cover this generally, but the PR provides concrete stage-GR examples and reviewer pushback that could improve examples or exception wording.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify copied header inline mirrors versus canonical helper use
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2688 contains Venom-local grVenom_JObj* inline mirrors with author evidence about jobj.h assert line numbers and Venom-owned strings, but reviewer feedback says not to copy/paste jobj inlines. Consider clarifying when, if ever, local inline mirrors are acceptable and what proof is required.
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards already prefer canonical HSD_JObj helpers; this PR highlights a contested exception pattern needing curator review rather than automatic promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr stage files own stage-specific GroundVars overlays
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer feedback in PR 2688 states each stage TU has one or more associated ground vars and should update/create appropriate gp->gv.<stage> fields instead of using unrelated arms. Diff evidence shows this for Big Blue and Venom.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be useful as a path-scoped fact, but should be reviewed because the PR slice does not establish all stage families or final resolution of all related comments.

rejection_notes: Do not promote 'local copied jobj.h inline mirrors are acceptable' as a general lesson; evidence is contested and current standards prefer canonical helpers.
Do not promote 'replace literals with address-named symbols for matching' as a general rule; PR evidence shows this is controversial and requires target metadata.
Do not infer final reviewer intent or resolution for every contested comment solely from merge status.
Do not claim all changed functions matched exactly; the PR body/bot report distinguish 10 exact matches from 11 improvements.
